template:
{{if .export_release}}### ✅ Export Released

Your consignment has completed all checks and has been granted the final Export Release clearance.

* **Release Number**: `{{.export_release.release_number}}`
* **Clearance Status**: Released for Export{{else}}### Wait on Export Release

Your consignment has completed all checks and is currently waiting for the final Export Release clearance from the Customs Department.

* **Release Number**: `{{.export_release.release_number}}`
* **Clearance Status**: Released for Export

Once the release signal is received from the Customs Agency app, this task will complete, finalizing the export clearance process.{{end}}
